No Poverty.reason: Trust law, as a financial instrument, can secure economic resources and provide access to financial services, aligning with Target 1.4 for the poor and vulnerable.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content on Trust Law has no discernible connection to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content on Trust Law does not relate to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) providing specialized legal knowledge and skills (Target 4.4) for professional application, directly contributing to quality education.
